Usage: openchrome [options] [command]

MCP server for parallel Claude Code browser sessions

Options:
  -V, --version     output the version number
  -h, --help        display help for command

Commands:
  serve [options]   Start the MCP server
  check [options]   Check Chrome connection status
  verify [options]  Verify performance optimizations are working
  info              Show how it works
  help [command]    display help for command
